goals.title: Fix Wizard and Intent Planning
goals.description: Restore functionality to the 'openexec wizard' and intent planning logic to allow successful intent.md generation and story import.
goals.success_criteria: Wizard runs, generates valid intent.md, and stories import without failure.
goals.verification_method: CLI verification of 'openexec wizard' and database check for imported stories.

goals.title: Restore CI/CD and Self-Healing
goals.description: Fix regressions in self-healing loops and return the CI/CD pipeline to a green state.
goals.success_criteria: CI/CD pipeline passes; self-healing recovers from errors without infinite loops.
goals.verification_method: Execute 'go test ./...' and simulated error recovery tests.

goals.title: Fix BitNet Routing
goals.description: Address routing failures where chat inputs do not reach handlers correctly.
goals.success_criteria: Chat inputs are correctly routed to general_chat or tool handlers.
goals.verification_method: Run 'openexec chat' and verify response accuracy.

stories.title: BitNet Router and Chat Input Routing
stories.description: As a user, I want my chat inputs correctly routed to handlers so that I can interact with the system via CLI.
acceptance_criteria: Inputs reach general_chat or tool handlers based on intent.
BitNet router correctly classifies inputs.
Response time for routing is under 200ms.
stories.verification_script: openexec chat "What is the status of my tasks?" | grep -v "error"

stories.title: Goal Validation and E2E Testing
stories.description: As a system owner, I want to verify that all primary goals are met so that the orchestrator is considered stable.
acceptance_criteria: Complete E2E flow: Wizard -> Import -> Execution -> Healing -> Chat Success.
CI/CD remains green across all platforms.
Audit database shows 100% trace coverage for the E2E run.

stories.title: Refactor Discovery and Legacy State Analysis
stories.description: As a developer, I want to map the existing broken state of the OpenExec orchestrator so that I can systematically fix failures without regressions.
acceptance_criteria: Environment variables and internal dependencies mapped.
API surface area for Wizard, Stories, and Router documented.
Current build failures in CI/CD identified and categorized.

stories.title: Core Architecture and CI/CD Restoration
stories.description: As a developer, I want the core architecture and CI/CD pipeline restored so that I can verify feature work against a stable baseline.
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests in 'go test ./...' pass.
CLI binary builds successfully for macOS, Linux, and Windows.
Audit database tracks execution state correctly.

stories.title: WizardEngine and Intent Planning Logic
stories.description: As a user, I want the 'openexec wizard' to work correctly so that I can generate intent.md files for my projects.
acceptance_criteria: Wizard generates a valid intent.md following the schema.
Interactive CLI prompts capture all required project goals and requirements.
Unit tests cover wizard logic in internal/wizard/.

stories.title: StoryManager and Import Logic
stories.description: As a user, I want stories to be imported from intent.md files so that the orchestrator can begin task execution.
acceptance_criteria: Stories are successfully parsed and saved to the audit database.
Dependency graphs for stories are correctly calculated.
Import failures provide clear error messages.
stories.verification_script: openexec stories import --file intent.md && sqlite3 .openexec/data/audit.db 'select count(*) from stories'

stories.title: Self-Healing Loop and Error Recovery
stories.description: As a developer, I want the agent loops to self-heal correctly so that systemic failures are handled autonomously.
acceptance_criteria: Self-healing logic in internal/dcp/healing.go recovers from simulated errors.
Exit strategy prevents infinite loops (C-003).
Recovery attempts are logged in audit.db.
